docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT KOTAR, SERGE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-10-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-10-2007 BY PAUL SLAVIT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK S. VANTREE. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINITFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (506).

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOTAR, SERGE $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $77.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,077.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CHAN, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT KOTAR, SERGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-10-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-03-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, MICHAEL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-10-2007 - JUDGMENT.
D.M.V. CERTIFICATE OF FACTS RE UNSATISFIED JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT KOTAR, SERGE
